	/* nova_ext_sim_central:news_update v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function update_news_item($id = '', $data = '', $identifier = 'news_id')
	{
		// Snapshot the prior status so news.posted only fires on the
		// transition to activated, not on every edit of a live item.
		$previousStatus = null;
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\Webhooks')) {
			$prev = $this->db->select('news_status')->get_where('news', array('news_id' => $id))->row();
			$previousStatus = $prev ? $prev->news_status : null;
		}

		$result = parent::update_news_item($id, $data, $identifier);

		if ($result > 0 && class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\Webhooks')) {
			\nova_ext_sim_central\Webhooks::onNewsChanged($id, $data, $previousStatus);
		}

		return $result;
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:news_update END */
